title: MikroTik SFP module S-55DLC80D, SM, 80km, 1.25G, 1550nm, 2x LC
description: The S-55DLC80D is a singlemode Gigabit SFP module with a 1550nm wavelength, two LC connectors and maximum distance up to 80km. The module iscompatible with all MikroTik products, that have SFP or SFP+ cages and other cisco compliant devices
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1550 Distance [km] 80 Transfer type 2-fiber Tx power [dBm] 0 up to 5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 25 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 85 General Compatibility Universal
